title: Vitebsk Heavy Rain
lead: Vitebsk is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.00. The Score of 10.0/10 indicates a severe anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Vitebsk are characterized by heavy rain, with an Umidita of 89% and Vento of 10.8 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 11.5 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating and energy consumption. 
 The Level is CRITICAL, requiring immediate attention and action to mitigate potential damages and disruptions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
